title: Brownfield Compatibility Slice
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-task-slice.md`, `./access-review-modernization-api-contract.md`, `./reassignments.py`, and `./test_reassignments.py`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce a small mergeable implementation increment for the reviewed access-review modernization slice. Keep the change behind the existing contract, preserve compatibility seams, make unsupported release-1 variants fail explicitly, and avoid broad cleanup or architecture redesign.

assertions.name: picks-smallest-reviewable-slice
assertions.description: Narrows to one concrete increment rather than bundling adjacent work or broad cleanup

assertions.name: implements-behind-tests
assertions.description: Keeps the implementation visibly anchored to the reviewed tests and contract boundary

assertions.name: preserves-scope-and-contract
assertions.description: Keeps compatibility seams, unsupported flows, and contract boundaries explicit

assertions.name: stays-implementation-focused
assertions.description: Stays at the implementation increment level instead of turning into planning or architecture redesign

assertions.name: prepares-review-handoff
assertions.description: Leaves a clean, understandable diff shape ready for code review
